description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa upholstered in a rich, medium-brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three individual backrest cushions and three seat cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be firmly attached to the frame. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, geometric silhouette. The legs are slim, black, and metallic, positioned at each corner and slightly angled outward, providing a subtle lift and contemporary touch. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern offices, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A modern, brown leather three-seater sofa with straight armrests, slim black metal legs, and smooth, unadorned upholstery. The design is minimalist and geometric, ideal for contemporary urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three uniform back and seat cushions, straight armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boxy armrest, the depth of the seat, and the slim black metal leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth back panel and the alignment of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and leg design, emphasizing the sofa's rectangular profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, attached seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions arranged in a single row, all flush with the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at full seat height, with a squared profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, black metal legs positioned at each corner, slightly angled outward, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest segmented into three attached cushions, continuous across the width of the sofa with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown color with a smooth, untextured leather or leather-like finish and no visible stitching or decorative pattern.
